meaning: n.工匠,手艺精巧的人,艺术家
examples: He was a craftsman in metalwork from Dresden.
The table in the kitchen was made by a local craftsman.
The cut of a diamond depends on the skill of its craftsman.
But he was a craftsman at heart and felt a piece of himself was missing.
Aside from its namesake retail chain, Sears also owns Craftsman, Kenmore and Lands End.
